# Riftbound Core Rules

## 1. Game Overview

Riftbound is a trading card game for two players. Each player builds a deck and competes to reduce the opponent's health to zero.

### 1.1 The Golden Rules

If a card contradicts the rules, the card takes precedence. Impossible instructions are ignored.

### 1.2 Starting the Game

Each player starts with 20 health points. Draw 5 cards to form your opening hand.

## 2. Card Types

There are several types of cards in Riftbound.

### 2.1 Champions

Champions are your main units. Each player starts with one champion.

### 2.2 Spells

Spells are one-time effects played from your hand.
